title: cosmic-crunch: Download JPL GENESIS COSMIC-1 GNSS radio-occultation profiles and convert them to netCDF4
description: A Python command-line tool that bulk-downloads JPL GENESIS COSMIC-1 (FORMOSAT-3) GNSS radio-occultation Level-2 ASCII profiles and converts them to self-describing netCDF4, with atomic, resumable downloads and filtering by instrument, year, and date (year and date by regex).
